auth.heading: Enter the Arena
auth.description: Authenticate to access the lobby and public matches.
auth.usernameInvalid: The username must be 3 to 20 characters and use only letters, numbers, or underscores.
auth.usernameInUse: This username is already in use.
lobby.heading: Public Lobby
lobby.prepareFailed: Some game files could not be loaded. Please try again.
lobby.emptyQueue: Join the public queue and we'll assign you to the best available room.
lobby.matchInProgress: You have a match in progress
lobby.eliminated: You were eliminated from this match
lobbyV2.description: Your tank is configured and ready to enter the arena.
lobbyV2.publicDescription: Enter the public queue and fight until only one tank remains.
garageV2.title: Tank garage
garageV2.description: Configure your combat identity before entering the arena.
tankCustomization.title: Tank appearance
tankCustomization.description: Make your tank recognizable before entering the arena.
tankCustomization.editorDescription: Choose an independent color for each part. Skins and additional parts can be added here later.
tankCustomization.parts.trackTreadShadow: Changes the shadow layer beneath the track tread.
tankCustomization.unsavedMessage: Your tank has changes that have not been saved. Discard them or continue editing.
lobby.privateRooms.createDescription: Choose a unique name and access code. Private matches do not award token rewards.
lobby.privateRooms.joinDescription: Enter the room name and access code shared by its administrator.
lobby.privateRooms.name: Room name
lobby.privateRooms.accessCodeHint: Use a code created only for this room. Do not use a personal password.
lobby.privateRooms.minimumPlayers: At least {{min}} connected players are required.
lobby.privateRooms.adminReady: Your squad is ready. Start when you want.
lobby.privateRooms.waitingForAdmin: Waiting for the administrator to start the match.
lobby.privateRooms.closedByInactivity: The private room was closed due to inactivity.
lobby.errors.roomCreateInvalid: Room name and access code are required.
lobby.errors.roomJoinInvalid: Room name and access code are required.
lobby.errors.roomNameInvalid: The room name must contain 3 to 40 valid characters.
lobby.errors.roomPasswordInvalid: The access code must contain {{minLength}} to {{maxLength}} characters.
lobby.errors.roomNameTaken: A room with that name already exists.
lobby.errors.roomNotFoundOrInvalidPasswo: Room not found or access code is incorrect.
lobby.errors.roomAlreadyJoined: Leave your current room before continuing.
lobby.errors.roomCreateInProgress: A room is already being created.
lobby.errors.roomAlreadyStarted: This room has already started a match.
lobby.errors.roomStartForbidden: Only the room administrator can start the match.
lobby.errors.roomMinPlayers: At least {{minPlayers}} connected players are required to start.
common.errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
common.errors.requestFailed: The request could not be completed.
game.errors.startFailed: The match could not be started.
game.errors.countdownAuthoritative: The room countdown starts the match automatically.
game.errors.restartDevelopmentOnly: Manual restart is only available in development mode.
game.errors.watchAdminOnly: Watching games is restricted to administrators.
queueFloating.startFailed: The match could not be started. Open the lobby for details.
adminStats.title: Server statistics
adminStats.subtitle: Live Node process usage and game activity.
adminStats.waiting: Waiting for the first server sample…
adminStats.historyHint: Only minutes with at least 2 connected players are stored. Loading may wake Neon.
adminStats.emptyHistory: No stored metrics in this range
adminStats.emptyHistoryHint: Only minutes with at least 2 connected players are recorded.
adminStats.errors.flush: The local batch could not be stored.
users.title: Users
pwaInstall.title: Install Tank Arena
pwaInstall.description: Bring the battle to your home screen and play it like an app. Enjoy a faster, more immersive experience designed for your device.
pwaInstall.quickAccess: Instant access from your home screen
pwaInstall.iosTitle: Add it to your home screen
pwaInstall.iosDescription: Apple requires installation through the browser menu. It only takes a few seconds.
pwaInstall.iosStepAdd: Choose “Add to Home Screen” and confirm
pwaInstall.androidDescription: The direct prompt is no longer available on this visit, but you can still install Tank Arena from the browser menu.
pwaInstall.androidStepInstall: Tap “Install app” or “Add to Home Screen”
game.rotateHint: Play in landscape for the best experience
tutorial.title: Quick tutorial
tutorial.saveError: We couldn't save your progress. Please try again.
tutorial.steps.0.title: Move
tutorial.steps.0.desktop: Use W, A, S and D to move around the arena.
tutorial.steps.0.mobile: Drag the left stick to move.
tutorial.steps.1.title: Aim
tutorial.steps.1.desktop: Move the mouse to aim the turret.
tutorial.steps.1.mobile: Drag the right stick to aim the turret.
tutorial.steps.2.title: Shoot
tutorial.steps.2.desktop: Click inside the arena to shoot.
tutorial.steps.3.title: Use dash
tutorial.steps.3.desktop: Move and press Shift for a quick burst of speed.
tutorial.steps.3.mobile: Move and tap the dash button for a burst of speed.
tutorial.steps.4.title: Activate the shield
tutorial.steps.4.desktop: Press Q to deploy your protective shield.
tutorial.steps.4.mobile: Tap the shield button to deploy it.
tutorial.readyDescription: Before entering combat, learn about the menu and the upgrades found in the arena.
tutorial.tips.menuDesktop: Press Escape to open settings or leave the match.
tutorial.tips.menuMobile: Tap the gear to open settings.
tutorial.powers.heading: Available power-ups
tutorial.powers.cooldownHint: Each has its own duration, ammo and cooldown. Check the HUD.
tutorial.powers.tripleShotDescription: Fires three projectiles in a spread with every shot.
tutorial.powers.shotgunDescription: Fires five pellets and is most effective at close range.
tutorial.powers.grenadeDescription: Explodes in an area and heavily damages enemies and obstacles.
tutorial.powers.laserDescription: Sustains a high-damage beam capable of piercing metal.
tutorialWelcome.title: Welcome, {{name}}!
tutorialWelcome.description: Learn Tank Arena's essential controls in under a minute before your first battle.
session.replaced: You opened this account in another tab. We closed this session to prevent playing twice.
session.claimed: You continued your session in this tab. The previous session was closed.
hud.controls: W A S D  -  MOUSE AIM  -  CLICK SHOOT
hud.returningToLobbyDev: RETURNING TO LOBBY IN {{seconds}}s · [ENTER] DEV RESTART
rewards.myMatches.title: My matches
rewards.myMatches.emptyState: You don't have any recorded matches yet.
rewards.myMatches.emptyStateHint: Play your first match to see it here.
rewards.myMatches.filteredEmpty: No matches for this filter among the loaded results.
rewards.recentMatches.title: Recent matches
rewards.recentMatches.emptyStateHint: Finished public matches will appear here.
rewards.eligibility.title: Token rewards
rewards.eligibility.description: Everyone can play. To receive rewards you must sign in and link your Phantom wallet.
rewards.eligibility.hint: Eligibility is validated when the match ends.
rewards.eligibility.verificationFailedHi: Your eligibility will be checked again when the match ends.
rewards.eligibility.insufficientHint: You need to hold at least 10,000 tokens.
rewards.eligibility.notLinkedHint: Link a wallet to be able to receive rewards.
rewards.disabled.unavailable: We could not check reward availability.
account.title: Account
account.accountInUse: The account you want to link is already in use.
account.googleAlreadyLinked: You already have a Google account linked.
account.phantomAlreadyLinked: You already have a Phantom account linked.
landing.hero.title: Tank Arena — Free Multiplayer Tank Battle Game, Play Instantly in Your Browser
landing.hero.subtitle: Jump into real-time tank combat against players around the world. No downloads, no installs — just open your browser and battle.
landing.features.heading: Built for real battles
landing.features.multiplayer.title: Real-time multiplayer combat
landing.features.multiplayer.description: Fight other players live in fast-paced tank battles powered by an authoritative server.
landing.features.destructible.title: Destructible obstacles
landing.features.destructible.descriptio: Blast through cover and reshape the battlefield as walls and barricades take damage and fall.
landing.features.powerUps.title: Power-ups
landing.features.powerUps.description: Grab weapon upgrades and boosts scattered across the arena to turn the tide of battle.
landing.features.dangerZone.title: Shrinking danger zone
landing.features.dangerZone.description: Stay inside the safe zone as it closes in, forcing constant movement and tense final standoffs.
landing.tanks.heading: Tanks and abilities
landing.gallery.heading: Screenshots
